utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) destination: provided (Amsterdam, Netherlands) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (July 25-30, 2024) – fully specified. 3) transportation: format requires flight details with costs; package has airline name and total_flight_cost, but lacks flight details such as departure/arrival cities, times, flight numbers; thus not fully specified. 4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs; provided hotel name, room type, total cost – sufficient. 5) activities: requires selected activities with costs; package lists activities but no costs – not fully specified. 6) additional_services: requires any extra services with costs; listed services but no costs – not fully specified. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; package gives a single total (€1,650) without breakdown by components – not a complete breakdown. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation = 3/7.
